dietary_guidelines: Proteins: light proteins (legumes, lentils, white fish)
Vegetables: light and warming (leafy greens, broccoli, cabbage)
Fruits: light fruits (apples, pears, berries, dates)

universal_guidelines.importance: Following these helps all doshas maintain balance
